## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/ransome1/sleek/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes, where it makes sense.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint`, `npm run format`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` and all checks pass.
- [ ] Only for new features: The feature I'm adding has been discussed in an issue beforehand and I've referenced it in the commit and PR description.

## Description

Please describe your changes and the problem they solve.
